underlying_goal: Comprehensively harden, optimize, and refactor their Flutter+PHP app ScanNutPlus across error handling, performance, offline support, code quality, and architecture
friction_detail: New SupabaseAuthInterceptor broke login by intercepting auth requests, and UI issues (invisible button, unwanted fields) required post-build fixes.
brief_summary: User requested ~15+ improvements spanning crash-proofing, offline caching, code audits, lint cleanup, architecture refactoring, and new features for their Flutter app; nearly all were successfully implemented with minor post-build fixes needed.
